if.test: searchWords != "" and searchWords != null and searchWords.size > 0

sql.if:
AND (
tui.user_id LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
OR
tui.user_nm LIKE CONCAT('%',#{searchWord},'%')
)

mapper.select:
SELECT tui.clnt_id, tui.uuid, tui.user_id, tui.user_nm, tui.user_ps, tui.email, tui.phone, tui.signature, tui.fcm_token, tui.auth_group_cd, tui.last_ps_date, tui.last_login_date, tui.last_login_os, tui.login_fail_cnt, tui.user_ip, tui.user_locale, tui.remark, tui.use_yn, tui.created_at, tui.created_by, tci.clnt_nm, tcg.grp_nm as auth_group_nm FROM esg.tb_user_info tui left join esg.tb_client_info tci on tui.clnt_id = tci.clnt_id left join esg.tb_comp_group tcg on tui.auth_group_cd = tcg.grp_cd WHERE 1=1 AND tui.auth_group_cd != 'MASTER'
ORDER BY tui.use_yn desc, tui.uuid LIMIT #{listSize, jdbcType=NUMERIC} OFFSET #{listStart, jdbcType=NUMERIC}
SELECT count(1) FROM esg.tb_user_info tui WHERE 1=1

SELECT tui.clnt_id, tui.uuid, tui.user_id, tui.user_nm, tui.user_ps, tui.email, tui.phone, tui.signature, tui.fcm_token, tui.auth_group_cd, tui.last_ps_date, tui.last_login_date, tui.last_login_os, tui.login_fail_cnt, tui.user_ip, tui.user_locale, tui.remark, tui.use_yn, tui.created_at, tui.created_by, tci.clnt_nm, tcg.grp_nm as auth_group_nm FROM esg.tb_user_info tui left join esg.tb_client_info tci on tui.clnt_id = tci.clnt_id left join esg.tb_comp_group tcg on tui.auth_group_cd = tcg.grp_cd WHERE 1=1 AND tui.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_user_info ( clnt_id, user_id, user_nm, user_ps, email, phone, signature, auth_group_cd, last_login_date, last_login_os, user_ip, user_locale, remark, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{clntId}, #{userId}, #{userNm}, #{userPs}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{signature}, #{authGroupCd}, null, #{lastLoginOs}, #{userIp}, #{userLocale}, #{remark}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_user_info SET clnt_id = CASE WHEN #{clntId} IS NOT NULL THEN #{clntId} ELSE clnt_id END, user_nm = #{userNm}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, user_ps = #{userPs}, signature = #{signature}, auth_group_cd = #{authGroupCd}, user_ip = #{userIp}, user_locale = #{userLocale}, remark = #{remark}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND clnt_id = #{currentClntId}
mapper.select: SELECT t1.comp_id FROM esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map t1 WHERE 1=1 AND t1.user_id = #{userId} AND t1.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map( hr_id, comp_id, orgn_comp_yn, created_at, created_by, use_yn, user_id ) VALUES ( #{hrId}, #{compId}, #{orgnCompYn}, now(), #{createdBy}, 'Y', #{userId} )
